feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Destiny Shivers
entry.summary:
Author: Chaotic_Thirst_Goblin

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 500Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 10

Summary: Merlin knows better than anyone that Arthur belongs to Albion, legends, and a future already written prophecy and secrets. But he takes every moment as they come, and he and Arthur form a bond, and find love that might just change their destiny after all. This collection of 100-word drabbles will share tales about about magic, kisses, devotion, destiny, and the precarious experience of loving someone history thinks it's already claimed. For the Come What May challenge on Tumblr.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Arthur Pendragon (Merlin)
  • Merlin (Merlin)
  • Drabbles
  • some will eventually be mature
  • 100 words each exactly
  • some are AU and some are canon compliant

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 113,953Chapters: 74/?Kudos: 37

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

entry.title: King & Court
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 378,942Chapters: 80/110Kudos: 3,553

Summary: Loneliness is an insidious thing. When Merlin looks at Arthur, he sees not just a prince waiting for his time to rule, but a young man struggling to find his place in the world, with little help from anyone else. The truth is, Arthur needs more than the friendship Merlin can offer. He needs people he can trust: men and women who will become his court and his confidants, and if he is going to survive to take the throne and lead Camelot into its golden age, he needs them sooner rather than later. Finding loopholes in Uther’s laws is no easy feat. Court life is a dangerous game, but it’s one Merlin has every intention of winning so that Arthur can have knights of his choosing by his side. And then there is the matter of his magic…

entry.title: Within Four Walls
entry.summary:
Author: Oakfiddle

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,225Chapters: 7/8Kudos: 50

Summary: Merlin and his mum wans to move away from Ealdor to get a fresh start, to leave his mum's abusive ex-boyfriend behind.They go to Camelot to look at a flat. His mum falls in love with the flat, and Merlin falls in love with the property manager, who also happens be the landlord's son.Why can't life be simple for once?

entry.title: The Tiny Glow of Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Itscanonifwewishenough

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 42,159Chapters: 10/18Kudos: 284

Summary: He shouldn’t have done it.Sleeping with his king — in the state Arthur was in that night.The worst part is, he doesn’t even remember all of it.— Just enough. The kiss. Arthur’s mouth, warm against his own. The breathless moans pulled from his throat. The way it felt like he was drunk — but even without the potion that caused all of this, Merlin knew one touch from Arthur would make him feel like he'd spent two whole weeks drinking in the tavern. And flashes of what came next.Enough to know that this time, he truly fucked up.So when he wakes, naked in his king’s bed, Merlin does the only thing he can — he grabs his clothes and runs.He barely makes it to Gaius’s chambers, disheveled and panicked, only to find the old man already holding the book Merlin now realizes — far too late — he mistranslated.And in that moment, it hits him. There is no undoing this. “Merlin,” Gaius says, voice low “pack your things. Go as far away as you can."“You’re carrying His Majesty’s child.” Or Arthur was being too much, and Merlin—a clumsy fool—mistranslated an ancient text and brewed a potion meant to calm His Majesty, only to end up pregnant with the king’s child instead.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: The Dragonlord's Predicament
entry.summary:
Author: JustGettingBy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,217Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 840

Summary: Merlin's new Dragonlord powers come with some unforeseen side effects. When he's kidnapped by bandits, the new aspect of his powers makes itself known. But Merlin could've gotten himself out of the mess on his own, thank you very much, if only Arthur hadn't made it worse by rushing in and trying to save him.

entry.title: The Bond Series: Season 2: Episode 1 "Home Isn't Home"
entry.summary:
Author: Foreverwolf_6

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 103,179Chapters: 17/19Kudos: 16

Summary: Change is for the young, they say. Arthur and Merlin struggle to build their dream of Albion while facing old enemies from within, and a new enemy on the horizon threatens to destroy everything. Consequences for a choice made long ago rear, and others are made which may destroy them both. Are they strong enough to stand united, or will they falter?

entry.title: The Language of Flowers
entry.summary:
Author: arduine

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,162Chapters: 11/15Kudos: 47

Summary: In which: there are flowers, feelings, fantasy, and forgiveness -- although not necessarily in that order.orFor as long as Arthur could remember, the importance of tradition had been impressed upon him. So, it was only natural for the prince to assume using Camelot’s oldest would be the perfect way of expressing his intentions. This is, of course, a terrible decision.

entry.title: You and me, we've got (browser) history
entry.summary:
Author: liviapeleia

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 32,931Chapters: 34/?Kudos: 223

Summary: A season 1 canon divergent AU told through Reddit posts. Gaius and Uther are having a secret love affair. Somehow, Geoffrey might be involved. Arthur has more throwaway accounts than brain cells, Morgana is an SJW (affectionate), Gwen is the only sane person, and Merlin is absolutely not in love, no way, never. And how the hell does Kilgharrah's cave have WiFi?

entry.title: Ezakıs and Humans
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 34,576Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 19

Summary: "You bring nothing but chaos," Merlin said, his voice echoing against the stone walls. "You will never reach that lake." Arthur closed the distance between them, a dangerous smirk playing on his lips. "Your kind only knows how to kneel, Merlin. Have you ever knelt for anyone?" Merlin didn't flinch. Instead, a wicked, knowing smile brushed his face. "No," he whispered, his breath teasing Arthur's skin. "But if you want to show me..." Beneath his skin, an ancient magic stirred impatiently. Arthur locked his gaze onto him. "Then by all means, try." In that moment, one thing became certain: Someone was going to kneel. — Long ago, humans and the Ezakis fought a war that nearly destroyed both races. At Lake Avalon, their kings finally swore peace before the sacred sword in stone, beginning the Age of Hazar. Years later, Uther Pendragon rose to power and shattered that peace. Desperate, humanity turned to Lake Avalon once more. The lake revealed Magic, and a colossal wall was raised between humans and the Ezakis. The spell could never break, the gate could never open, and humanity’s secret had to remain hidden. Yet another power was born that day—Merlin.

entry.title: Kill Your Darlings➳Merthur
entry.summary:
Author: asomina

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,088Chapters: 11/12Kudos: 275

Summary: There's something off about the way Merlin is looking at Arthur. He's nervous, awkward and instead of hiding his suspicious behaviour with insults or jokes. He drowns Arthur's concerns with kisses. or.... In which Mordred disguises himself as Merlin to destroy Camelot from the inside. However, he mistakenly believes Merlin and Arthur are in an extremely intense, romantic relationship. Maybe he embodies Merlin a little too well.   Aka the body swap AU no one asked for.Featuring band favourites: Flirty Gwaine, lesbian awaking Morgana, himbo Arthur, Mordred being confused and Merlin finally getting the day off he needed.

entry.title: Firebug
entry.summary:
Author: seraknockiddy

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,280Chapters: 6/13Kudos: 6

Summary: A series of mysterious fires has been terrorizing the small town of Colchester for months now. Uther Pendragon, the incumbent mayor, finds this anything but amusing - especially so close to the town's bi-thousandth anniversary celebrations. Consequently, he has no choice but to call in outside help to restore peace to his beautiful town (and ensure his re-election next year). Arthur - his son and the chief of the local fire department - is far from thrilled at the prospect of being scrutinized by a conceited big-city inspector. Not that he has anything to hide, mind you; in fact, he feels he has had the situation quite well under control on his own - until another fire nearly costs one of his crew members their life ...

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,190Chapters: 19/?Kudos: 49

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but instead sets in motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy. Faces from the past and present blur together as Merlin tries to save the world he wanted to leave.

entry.title: The Curse of One Love
entry.summary:
Author: luma882

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,558Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 28

Summary: Camelot is cursed. When Merlin enters the city, he does not yet realize that his fate is already bound to the name Pendragon. Arthur Pendragon's protection quickly turns to possession, his concern to a dangerous obsession. As an ancient dragon's curse begins to stir - and Uther Pendragon's madness stands as a warning - Merlin finds himself at the center of a love that can both save and destroy. For a Pendragon loves only once. And when that love is lost, all that remains is madness.
